name: Cream Cheese Apple Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together in a bowl until smooth.
2. Dip sliced Granny Smith apples into the dip.
3. Place the apples on a serving platter and roll them into crushed peanuts.
4. Enjoy! This makes a great fruit dish for parties or buffets, or you can simply enjoy it at home.
